issue_title: adding to a dotted inline table produces corrupt output
issue_text:
```python
import tomlkit

src = "a = {b.c = 1}\n"

doc = tomlkit.parse(src)
assert doc == {"a": {"b": {"c": 1}}}, "src is valid TOML"

doc["a"]["b"]["d"] = 2

out = tomlkit.dumps(doc)
print(out)
```
output
```
a = {b.c = 1d = 2
}
```
which is not good
success_criteria: 补充真实仓库后，需要人工完善成功标准。
